channel.title: Swarm on Xieydd Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Swarm on Xieydd Blog
channel.copyright: © This post is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License，please give source if you likes to quote or reproduce.

item.title: Docker
item.description: [Docker] 1. 部署第一个容器 以运行redis容器为例,作为数据库，需要持续的运行 $ docker search redis #在background运行3.2版本 $ docker run -d redis:3.2 # $ docker ps CONTAINER ID IMAGE COMMAND CREATED STATUS PORTS NAMES bcfa0307fe3b redis "docker-entrypoint..." 19 seconds ago Up 19 seconds 6379/tcp flamboyant_pasteur $ docker inspect bcfa0307fe3b #或者name $ docker logs bcfa0307fe3b [ { "Id": "bcfa0307fe3b5287e05cec154ac557be067d3cec7fa26c502fe59fad8a55d66a", "Created": "2018-01-04T13:12:19.047437762Z", "Path": "docker-entrypoint.sh", "Args": [ "redis-server" ], "State": { "Status": "running", "Running": true, "Paused": false, "Restarting": false, "OOMKilled": false, "Dead": false, "Pid": 445, "ExitCode": 0, "Error": "", "StartedAt": "2018-01-04T13:12:19.
